overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a modern residential bathroom. The character walks from the vanity area around a curved wardrobe to a toilet nook, then returns toward a doorway leading to a living area with a nighttime city view visible through large windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern bathroom vanity and toilet corner

agents.ego_description: walking from the vanity area around the curved wardrobe toward the toilet nook in the corner

entered.detail: white vanity table with circular mirror surrounded by round bulbs
tall white curved cabinet with black handles
circular rug with pink and orange geometric pattern
tall rectangular mirror with copper frame leaning against wall
modern white wall-mounted toilet in corner nook
floating shelf above toilet with potted plant and yellow vase
white open shelving unit with towels and decorative boxes

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a modern bathroom facing a lit vanity mirror. She walks left around a curved white wardrobe toward a toilet area in the corner, passing a tall wall mirror. The space features beige marble tiles, a pink geometric rug, and modern fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom exit leading to living area

events.description: approaching doorway revealing living area with nighttime city view through large windows

agents.ego_description: turning away from the toilet and walking back through the bathroom toward the doorway to the living area

entered.detail: wide doorway with metallic frame leading to dark living area with city lights visible through windows
tall modern floor lamp with rectangular white shade

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the toilet and walks back through the bathroom, passing the vanity again. She approaches a wide doorway that reveals a living area with large windows overlooking a nighttime cityscape. A modern shelving unit with towels becomes prominent on the right as she nears the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a modern, brightly lit bathroom that eventually opens into a living area overlooking a nighttime city. It begins facing a lit vanity mirror, moving left past a curved white wardrobe and a tall wall mirror toward a toilet nook tucked in the corner of the beige marble space. As the character turns away from the corner, the camera tracks back across the pink geometric rug and past the vanity once more. The scene then shifts toward a wide doorway, passing a modern shelving unit filled with towels on the right. Finally, the view expands through the exit to reveal a living area with large windows framing a glowing urban skyline at night.
